project.name: BuildLoop
project.summary: Early-stage SaaS product that helps startup teams collect product feedback, share changelogs, and build repeat user engagement.

product: Feedback and release hub for startup teams shipping quickly.
Self-serve SaaS with a freemium entry point and paid collaboration tier.
audience: Startup founders and product teams who need lightweight feedback workflows.
Early adopters and power users who want clearer visibility into product changes.
workflows: Collect feedback from users and tag signals by theme.
Review prioritized feedback and decide what to ship next.
Publish changelog updates and encourage return engagement.
domain: Product-led SaaS where trust, clarity, and founder responsiveness matter.
Community participation can improve feedback quality and retention.
business_model: Freemium product with paid team collaboration and higher-volume workflows.
growth: Current priorities are activation, clearer positioning, and stronger feedback loops.
constraints: Small startup team with limited content bandwidth and founder-led GTM.
assumptions: Community motion is promising but not yet fully structured.

approved_facts.summary: Most activation drop-off happens before a team publishes its first feedback board.

preferences.summary: Keep founder voice visible in community and changelog surfaces rather than delegating all interaction to generic brand copy.

rejected_strategies.summary: Generic build-in-public posting without product-specific lessons did not create meaningful engagement.

successful_patterns.summary: Live teardown sessions of real feedback workflows created the best signups and repeat engagement.

open_questions.summary: It is still unclear whether the strongest ICP is founder-led teams or larger product squads.

experts.title: Product Manager
experts.summary: Owns product prioritization, workflow clarity, and roadmap tradeoffs for activation and feedback-loop quality.
mandate: Clarify what product problems matter most and turn them into prioritized decisions.

experts.title: Product Marketer
experts.summary: Owns value communication, positioning, and launch framing for a founder-led startup product.
mandate: Translate product value and founder insight into clearer market-facing messaging.

experts.title: Community Lead
experts.summary: Owns community loops, founder-facing engagement, and feedback-driven participation systems.
mandate: Create repeatable community engagement loops that improve both product learning and advocacy.
